meaning: n.本笃会的僧,一种甜酒adj.本笃的,本笃会的
examples: It is a Methodist-Benedictine residential double monastery in Collegeville, Minnesota.
She teaches writing at College of DuPage and Benedictine University.
All Lisle hotels are located within three miles of the Benedictine University.
Trillium filed its proposal on behalf of a client, the Benedictine Sisters of Mount St.
Aloe lace is made in Croatia only by Benedictine nuns in the town of Hvar.
